channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish and bags of rubbish dumped in between shrubs behind phone box on Rodway Road, 10th March
item.description:
In shrubs between phone box on Rodway Road to entrance tomorrow Hawes Road, there is rubbish everywhere, including black bags of household waste. Please can you send a team to clear up, there is a lot of rubbish in road and in between the shrubs. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It is right outside my house, 10th March
item.description:
This rubbish has not been cleaned up by the tenants , they live next door to me and I have a baby living here and I am now paranoid I’m going to ants and mice in my home which I like to keep clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Philimore Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti all over, 10th March
item.description:
Graffiti all over the forest and paths.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working at all ( street light behind phone box on Rodway Road), 10th March
item.description:
Please fix light, not working at all. It’s the light behind the phone box on Rodway Road (behind sinclaircottages).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsley Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6 old cars parked around no 49 Goddard Rd, 10th March
item.description:
6 old cars parked around 49 Goddard Rd, the home of the owner, query if they are taxed or insured as they rarely move, cause parking problems.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goddard Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly posting, 10th March
item.description:
Fly posted advertisement PAVILION

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This graffiti is painted, 10th March
item.description:
This graffiti is painted all over the park from Kidbrooke station to the Aldi shop and the dog walking area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thyme Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Ankerdine Crescent at junction with Shrewsbury Labe, 10th March
item.description:
There is some graffiti on the green box at this location. Please can it be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrewsbury Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 10th March
item.description:
Street light not working between house number 40 and 42, pole number 14
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Oakleigh Park North, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, in line with the rear of the breakfast club, St Pancras, 10th March
item.description:
Pot hole. Massive!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midland Road, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bin., 10th March
item.description:
Again. Can you move the 2 bins from the west side of Foxgrove as east side is closest to the bus stop? Or add in a bin?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the pavement for last few days, door is open, 10th March
item.description:
Not a usual car in the street. Car is open

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Austin Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes east of Theberton St, 10th March
item.description:
Lots of potholes near the east end of Theberton Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Theberton Street, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 10th March
item.description:
Clearly abandoned vehicle flat tyre. Tax and mot expired in 2022. Please remove asap is an eyesore. Causing blockage to other cars. Taking up valuable parking space and clearly abamdoned/dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitti on green virgin box, 10th March
item.description:
On virgin box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellan Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes and tree branches overhanging, 10th March
item.description:
Encroaching on the pavement all along the stretch of Picketts Lock Lane walking up to the bus stop the bushes are stopping 2 people to walk side by side safely people have to step out into the road to let someone pass because the bushes and tree branches are over hanging the pavement and some branches are at eye level it makes the pavement difficult to walk for blind and partially sighted people. Needs trimming back.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hudson Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyres and no MOT or tax, 10th March
item.description:
This car has been parked in same plave for months. Both front tyres are flat, it is not taxed (expired April 2022) nor has a vaild MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further dumping of rubbish, 10th March
item.description:
A very large empty box and some gas canisters have been dumped by our bins; we are currently having rubbish dumped every few days in front of our home and our bins filled with large bags of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wild's Rents, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins not emptied and street covered in rubbish. Our normal road sweeper is not been around and no one else seems to have been to empty a bin or sweep the street or clear the green areas., 10th March
item.description:
Liverpool Grove has not been cleaned in days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again., 10th March
item.description:
Right on cue our lovely local HMO has dumped all their household rubbish in the usual spot. This is because their bins are hardly ever emptied because they’re always contaminated and overflowing. As most HMO’s do.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
